_template.consumer: A bounded worker implementing the Phase 4 wikilink verifier.
_template.replacement_rationale: Demonstrates the governed task packet without creating a second template.

objective: Implement deterministic vault wikilink and mandatory-layer verification.

forbidden: Commit, publish, or change source repositories

risks: Duplicate note stems could make a link ambiguous; report ambiguity instead of guessing
return_contract: Return examples/result-packet/example.json with exact checks and disposition.
